def land_avail_rule(model, s):
    crop_area = sum(model.xcrop[p, s] for p in model.p) if s in model.sc else 0
    feed_area = sum(model.lio[s, r] * model.xliver[r] for r in model.r)
    return crop_area + model.lswitch[s] + feed_area <= model.landc[s]
model.land_avail = Constraint(model.s, rule=land_avail_rule)

results.generated: model.livestock_balance = Constraint(expr= model.xlive == sum(model.xliver[r] for r in model.r))
model.livestock_ration_balance = Constraint(expr= model.rationr == sum(model.rations[r]*model.xliver[r] for r in model.r))

def prod_ge_usage_rule(model, c):
    prod_tons = sum(model.yield_param[p, c, s] * model.xcrop[p, s] for p in model.p for s in model.sc) / 1000.0
    use_tons = model.sales[c] + sum(model.cbndl[c, dr] * model.cons[dr] for dr in model.dr)
    return prod_tons >= use_tons
model.prod_ge_usage = Constraint(model.c, rule=prod_ge_usage_rule)

results.generated: model.labcost_def = Constraint(expr= model.labcost == (sum(model.flab[tm] for tm in model.tm)/model.dpm)*model.fwage + (sum(model.tlab[tm] for tm in model.tm)/model.dpm)*model.twage + model.plab*model.pwage)

model.cash_spending_limit = Constraint(expr=
    model.cropcost
    + model.rationr
    + model.vetcost
    + sum(model.twage * model.tlab[tm] / model.dpm for tm in model.tm)
    + model.pwage * model.plab
    <= model.wcbar)

model.farm_income_def = Constraint(expr= model.yfarm == model.revenue + model.vsc*sum(model.cons[dr] for dr in model.dr) - (model.labcost + model.rationr + model.vetcost + model.cropcost) - model.phi*( sum(model.pdev[ty] + model.ndev[ty] for ty in model.ty ) / sum(1 for ty in model.ty) ) )

def crop_production_rule(model, c):
    return model.xprod[c] == sum(model.yield_param[p,c,s] * model.xcrop[p,s] for p in model.p for s in model.sc) / 1000
model.crop_production = Constraint(model.c, rule=crop_production_rule)

def sales_consumption_rule(model, c):
    return model.xprod[c] == model.sales[c] + sum(model.cbndl[c,dr] * model.cons[dr] for dr in model.dr)
model.sales_consumption = Constraint(model.c, rule=sales_consumption_rule)

model.livestock_total = Constraint(expr= model.xlive == sum(model.xliver[r] for r in model.r))

model.ration_balance = Constraint(expr= model.rationr == sum(model.rations[r] * model.xliver[r] for r in model.r))

def land_capacity_rule(model, s):
    return sum(model.xcrop[p,s] for p in model.p) + model.lswitch[s] + sum(model.lio[s,r] * model.xliver[r] for r in model.r) <= model.landc[s]
model.land_capacity = Constraint(model.s, rule=land_capacity_rule)

def monthly_labor_rule(model, tm):
    cropping_lab = sum(model.labor[p,tm] * sum(model.xcrop[p,s] for s in model.sc) for p in model.p)
    livestock_lab = sum(model.llab[tm,r] * model.xliver[r] for r in model.r)
    return model.flab[tm] + model.tlab[tm] + model.plab * model.dpm == cropping_lab + livestock_lab
model.monthly_labor = Constraint(model.tm, rule=monthly_labor_rule)

def family_lab_limit_rule(model, tm):
    return model.flab[tm] <= model.famlab * model.dpm
model.family_lab_limit = Constraint(model.tm, rule=family_lab_limit_rule)

model.cropcost_def = Constraint(expr= model.cropcost == sum(model.pcost[p] * model.xcrop[p,s] for p in model.p for s in model.s))

model.revenue_def = Constraint(expr= model.revenue == sum(model.price[c] * 1000 * model.sales[c] for c in model.c) + model.lprice * model.xlive)

model.vetcost_def = Constraint(expr= model.vetcost == model.vetpr * model.xlive)

model.labcost_def = Constraint(expr= model.labcost == model.fwage * (sum(model.flab[tm] for tm in model.tm) / model.dpm) + model.twage * (sum(model.tlab[tm] for tm in model.tm) / model.dpm) + model.pwage * model.plab)

model.income_def = Constraint(expr= model.yfarm == model.revenue - model.cropcost - model.labcost - model.vetcost - model.rationr)
